title: TigreSoto Overlay Colors
description: This texture helps you see how many armor uses your enemy has left and is compatible with versions higher than 1.21.4
body:
Armor Durability Overlay is a simple and useful texture overlay that lets you see how many durability uses are left on your opponent’s armor.

This pack is especially helpful for PvP situations, giving you an advantage by showing when an enemy’s armor is close to breaking.

✅ Works on Minecraft versions 1.21.4+
⚠️ Required mod: Variants CIT (this overlay will not work without it)

Perfect for competitive players who want better visual information during fights
